component.name: Snipcom
component.summary: Manage local command and text snippets in table or grid views

description.p: Snipcom is a desktop utility for organizing plain text files, reusable commands, and quick clipboard-driven snippets in a single folder.

It includes table and grid views, search by title and content, tags, clipboard paste and rewrite actions, launch controls for command files, custom trash handling, and persistent interface preferences.
